query:
_view=sumologic_search_usage_per_query 
query_type=copilot
// flex billable
| max(scanned_partition_count) as p,count as searches, sum(data_scanned_bytes) as scan_bytes by query,user_name

| round(scan_bytes / 1G,1) as scan_gb
| parse regex field=query "^(?<scope>[^\|]*)" 
| sum(searches) as searches, max(p) as max_partitions,sum(scan_gb) as scan_gb,avg(scan_gb) as avg_scan_gb, values(user_name) as users by scope | sort scope asc
| round (scan_gb,2) as scan_gb | round(avg_scan_gb,2) as avg_scan_gb
